tasks.title: Implement Subpar Battery structure
tasks.description: Add the Subpar Battery as a new constructible structure in the game. This includes: build logic with resource costs (2 Energy + 2 Rock), adjacency requirements (must be on empty tile adjacent to Solar Panel or Rock Hovel), dynamic Rock Hovel energy capacity bonus (+4 per adjacent battery, including two-hop via Solar Panel), 2% per-turn explosion chance with removal, canvas rendering, UI button with enable/disable logic, tile info display, hotkey (T), and game log entries for building and exploding.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. 'Build Subpar Battery' button in action panel, enabled only when Elon is on empty tile adjacent to Solar Panel or Rock Hovel with >=2 Energy and >=2 Rock.
2. Building deducts 2 Energy and 2 Rock, places Subpar Battery structure.
3. Rock Hovel energy capacity increases by 4 per adjacent Subpar Battery (direct or two-hop via Solar Panel).
4. Tile info shows updated capacity (e.g., 'Energy: X / 6').
5. Solar Panels store energy up to new increased cap.
6. 2% per-turn explosion chance removes battery, logs message, removes capacity bonus.
7. Distinct canvas rendering with label.
8. Hotkey T for building.
9. Log entries for build and explosion events.

checklist.description: Add getAdjacentStructures() and getHovelCapacity() helper functions
steps: Add getAdjacentStructures(row, col, type) function near getAdjacentHovels in game.js
Add getHovelCapacity(hovel) function that computes base 2 + 4 per unique adjacent battery (direct + two-hop via Solar Panel)
Verify getHovelCapacity uses a Set to deduplicate batteries reachable both ways
Add canBuildSubparBattery() that checks >=2 Energy, >=2 Rock, empty tile, adjacent to Solar Panel or Rock Hovel
Add buildSubparBattery() that deducts 2 Energy + 2 Rock, pushes structure, adds log, re-renders
Verify build function follows same pattern as buildSolarPanel()
Add processSubparBatteryExplosions() that iterates structures in reverse, 2% chance to remove each battery
Add log message with 'explosion' type when a battery explodes
Call processSubparBatteryExplosions() in endTurn() BEFORE processSolarPanels()

checklist.description: Update processSolarPanels() to use dynamic energy capacity
steps: Replace hardcoded 'hovels[j].energy < 2' with 'hovels[j].energy < getHovelCapacity(hovels[j])'
Verify Solar Panels can now store energy up to the new increased cap

checklist.description: Add canvas rendering for Subpar Battery
steps: Create drawSubparBattery(structure) function with distinct visual (green/lime battery body, terminal nubs, 'BATTERY' label)
Add dispatch in drawStructure() for type 'subpar_battery'
Verify the battery renders on the canvas tile at correct position

checklist.description: Add Build Subpar Battery button in HTML action panel
steps: Add <button id='build-battery-btn' class='action-btn' disabled>Build Subpar Battery (2 ⚡ 2 🪨)</button> after the Solar Panel button in index.html
Add click event listener for build-battery-btn calling buildSubparBattery() in game.js

checklist.description: Add button enable/disable logic in updateUI()
steps: Add batteryBtn.disabled = !canBuildSubparBattery() in the updateUI() function
Verify button is enabled only when on empty tile adjacent to Solar Panel or Rock Hovel with sufficient resources

checklist.description: Add keyboard hotkey T for building Subpar Battery
steps: Add case 't' in the keydown switch block calling buildSubparBattery()
Add hotkey row TBuild Subpar Battery to the hotkey modal table in index.html

checklist.description: Update tile info display for Subpar Battery and dynamic hovel capacity
steps: Add else-if branch in updateTileInfo() for subpar_battery type showing 'Subpar Battery'
Change Rock Hovel energy display from hardcoded '/ 2' to '/ ' + getHovelCapacity(tileStructure)
Verify tile info shows correct capacity (e.g., 'Energy: 0 / 6' with one adjacent battery)

checklist.description: Add CSS style for explosion log entries
steps: Add #game-log .log-entry.explosion { color: #ff4444; } to style.css
Verify explosion log messages display in red

quality_checklist.description: No hardcoded energy capacity '2' remains in processSolarPanels or updateTileInfo for Rock Hovels
steps: Grep game.js for 'energy < 2' and '/ 2' in Rock Hovel contexts
Verify all references use getHovelCapacity() instead

quality_checklist.description: Battery deduplication in getHovelCapacity prevents double-counting
steps: Read getHovelCapacity() implementation
Verify it uses a Set or equivalent to deduplicate batteries reachable both directly and via Solar Panel

quality_checklist.description: Explosion iterates structures in reverse to avoid index shifting bugs
steps: Read processSubparBatteryExplosions()
Verify the for loop uses a decrementing index (i--) and splice(i, 1)

quality_checklist.description: Code style matches existing patterns (var vs const/let, function naming, structure)
steps: Compare new functions with buildSolarPanel, canBuildSolarPanel, drawSolarPanel patterns
Verify consistent naming, indentation, and variable declaration style

quality_checklist.description: No unused code, no over-engineering, no extra abstractions beyond what's needed
steps: Review all new code for unnecessary complexity
Verify no dead code paths or unused variables were introduced

checks.description: Build Subpar Battery button appears and is disabled by default
steps: Open the game in a browser at http://localhost:8080
Look for 'Build Subpar Battery' button in the action panel sidebar
Verify button is present and disabled (Elon starts with 0 resources)

checks.description: Battery can be built when adjacent to Solar Panel or Rock Hovel with sufficient resources
steps: Gather 12+ rocks (for a Rock Hovel + Solar Panel + battery cost)
Build a Rock Hovel (B key), move to adjacent tile
Build a Solar Panel (P key), move to another adjacent tile
Verify Build Subpar Battery button becomes enabled when on empty tile adjacent to a structure with enough resources
Press T to build the battery
Verify resources decrease by 2 Energy and 2 Rock
Verify battery appears on the canvas with 'BATTERY' label

checks.description: Rock Hovel tile info shows increased capacity when battery is adjacent
steps: Click on a Rock Hovel tile that has an adjacent Subpar Battery
Verify tile info shows 'Energy: X / 6' instead of 'X / 2'
Build a second adjacent battery if possible and verify capacity shows '/ 10'

checks.description: Hotkey T works and hotkey modal shows the binding
steps: Press ESC to open the hotkey modal
Verify there is a row showing 'T' -> 'Build Subpar Battery'
Close modal, verify T key triggers the build when conditions are met

checks.description: Game log entries appear for build and explosion events
steps: Build a battery and verify a log entry appears
End many turns and eventually observe an explosion log entry (or verify the code path exists)
Verify explosion log text is styled in red
